title: Weapon Draw Timer
description: A mod that adds a timer + crosshair to indicate when projectile weapon is fully charged
body:
A mod that displays a draw time timer and crosshair when a projectile weapon is being drawn.

Fully open source and licensed under GPLv3.

# Features

- :3
- timer (directly below crosshair)
- moving crosshair with variations
- color, crosshair size configurable
